chapter_title.en: Preparing for the hereafter by following God''s commandments

text: قَدْ عَلِمَ السَّرائِرَ، وَخَبَرَ الضَّمائِرَ، لَهُ الاْحَاطَةُ بِكُلِّ شَيْء، وَالْغَلَبَةُ لِكُلِّ شَيْء، وَالْقُوَّةُ عَلى كُلِّ شَيْء.

en.sayed-ali-raza: Allāh knows hidden matters and is aware of inner feelings. He encompasses everything. He has control over everything and power over everything.
